headline: A Look At Waste Management (WM) Valuation After Insider Selling Dividend Declaration And Earnings Miss
summary: Recent dividend decision and market reaction Waste Management (WM) has come under closer investor focus after a recent share price drop, insider stock sales by senior executives, a slightly weaker fourth quarter, and the declaration of a new quarterly dividend. The company approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.945 per share, payable on March 27, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 13, 2026. This adds an income consideration to a period of heightened market scrutiny. See our latest...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Waste Management (WM) After Multi‑Year Share Price Surge?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Waste Management's share price still offers value at current levels, this breakdown will help you see what the numbers actually say about the stock. The shares recently closed at US$235.54, with returns of 3.9% over 30 days, 7.8% year to date, 6.6% over 1 year, 59.1% over 3 years and 106.3% over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about how much upside or downside might be left. Recent news flow around large scale infrastructure spending, waste...
